<?php namespace Knuckles\Camel\Extraction; use Knuckles\Camel\BaseDTO; class Parameter extends BaseDTO { public string $name; public ?string $description = null; public bool $required = false; public mixed $example = null; public string $type = 'string'; public array $enumValues = []; public bool $exampleWasSpecified = false; public bool $nullable = false; public bool $deprecated = false; public function __construct(array $parameters = []) { unset($parameters['setter']); parent::__construct($parameters); } }
